title: mentha × sativa var. parviflora
intro: Mentha × sativa var. parviflora, also known as American mint, is a variety of the spearmint plant that is native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mentha × sativa var. parviflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Mentha × sativa var. parviflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
